creator: pirzyk@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since the MASTER_SITE no longer exists and it looks like this is a no longer supported project, I propose we remove sysutils/psgconf from the ports tree.

I do not see any specific steps to remove a port from the tree, other than updating the ports/sysutils/Makefile as:

11>diff -Nru Makefile.orig Makefile
--- Makefile.orig	2014-06-06 10:26:31.000000000 -0500
+++ Makefile	2014-06-09 14:58:48.260711937 -0500
@@ -706,7 +706,6 @@
     SUBDIR += procenv
     SUBDIR += procmap
     SUBDIR += progsreiserfs
-    SUBDIR += psgconf
     SUBDIR += pslist
     SUBDIR += psmisc
     SUBDIR += pstack
